title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's growth team used Claude Code to achieve record-setting expansion from $1B to $19B in 14 months. He identifies four strategies including workflow automation, enabling sub-threshold work, building custom tools, and using AI as thought partnership, plus common mistakes that reduce productivity gains.
